title: Optify
body: # OPTIFY - THE BEST OPTIMIZATION PACK ![OptifyTITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc61ac723aaed973fe46f660f85833fac6d87c1f.png) ✨ OptiFine but way better — lightweight, faster, and built for the modern game. --- ## 🔍 Overview Optify is a **Fabric-based optimization modpack** designed for players who want the best possible Minecraft performance without sacrificing any of the features they love from OptiFine. Whether you're playing on a low-end laptop or a powerful gaming PC, Optify gives you **higher FPS, faster world loading, lower RAM usage, and smoother gameplay** — right out of the box. No bloat. No unnecessary mods. Just pure, clean performance. This modpack focuses on: - Replacing OptiFine with superior, modern alternatives - Maximizing FPS across all hardware tiers - Supporting shaders, connected textures, and zoom natively - Staying fully client-side — works on any server - Keeping up with every new Minecraft version --- ## 🚀 Features - ⚡ **Faster than OptiFine** — significantly higher FPS in all scenarios - 🎨 **Full shader support** via Iris Shaders - 🧱 **Connected textures** support out of the box - 🔍 **Zoom** functionality included - 🪶 **Lightweight** — minimal RAM footprint - 🌐 **100% client-side** — works on any Vanilla, Paper, or modded server - 🔄 **Always updated** — new version every Minecraft release - 🧩 Built on **Fabric** for fast load times and great mod compatibility --- ## ⚡ Performance Optify is engineered from the ground up for maximum performance. Every mod is carefully selected to eliminate redundancy and squeeze every frame out of your hardware. Performance mods included: ### 🔧 Rendering - **Sodium** — The gold standard for Minecraft rendering optimization - **ImmediatelyFast** — Optimizes immediate mode rendering throughout the game - **Entity Culling** — Skips rendering entities you can't see - **More Culling** — Extends culling to leaves, vines, etc. - and more... ### 🧠 CPU & Memory - **Lithium** — Optimizes game logic, physics, and mob AI - **FerriteCore** — Drastically reduces RAM usage - **ModernFix** — Fixes memory leaks and improves startup time - **Memory Leak Fix** — Patches known JVM memory leaks - and more... ### 📡 Server & Network - **Krypton** — Optimizes Minecraft's networking stack - and more... ### 🕹️ Startup & Quality - **Dynamic FPS** — Reduces FPS when the game is in the background - **FastQuit** — Instant quit to title screen - and more... --- ## 🎨 OptiFine Feature Replacements Optify fully replaces OptiFine with better, open-source alternatives: | OptiFine Feature | Optify Replacement | |---|---| | Shaders | Iris Shaders | | Connected Textures | Continuity | | Zoom | Zoomify / Ok Zoomer | | Dynamic Lights | LambDynamicLights | | Better Grass / Snow | N/A (handled by resource packs) | --- ## 🧩 Included Mods - [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/vSEH1ERy) - [Translations for Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/yfDziwn1) - [UniLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/nT86WUER) - [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/wnEe9KBa) - [YOSBR](https://modrinth.com/mod/WwbubTsV) - [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/1eAoo2KR) - [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/w7ThoJFB) - [libIPN](https://modrinth.com/mod/onSQdWhM) - [spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/l6YH9Als) --- ## 💻 System Requirements **Minimum:** - RAM: 2 GB allocated - CPU: Any dual-core processor - GPU: Integrated graphics supported **Recommended:** - RAM: 3–4 GB allocated - CPU: Any quad-core processor - GPU: Any dedicated GPU (NVIDIA/AMD) > 💡 Tip: Allocate no more than 4 GB RAM — over-allocation can actually reduce performance in Minecraft. --- ## 🌐 Multiplayer Optify is **100% client-side**. This means: - ✅ Works on any Vanilla server - ✅ Works on any Paper / Spigot server - ✅ Works on any modded server - ✅ No mods required on the server side - ✅ Safe for use on public SMP servers --- ## 🎯 Perfect For - 🖥️ Low-end and mid-range PCs - 🎮 Players upgrading from OptiFine - 🌍 SMP server players - 🏎️ Anyone chasing maximum FPS - 🎨 Shader users wanting better performance - 🔰 New players wanting a clean, fast experience --- ## 📦 Versions Optify supports: - ✅ 1.21.11 *(Latest)* - ✅ 1.21.8 - ✅ 1.21.4 – 1.21.5 - ✅ 1.20.1 Optify updates every time a new Minecraft version is released. --- ## 📝 Notes - 🪶 Extremely lightweight — no content mods, no bloat - ⚡ Faster startup than vanilla with OptiFine - 🧹 Clean, conflict-free mod selection - 🔒 MIT Licensed — free and open - 🔄 Actively maintained and updated regularly NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.
